headline: Notice of the Annual General Meeting to Approve the 2025 Financial Statements, Scheduled for May 22, 2026, and Changes to the Atos Board of Directors
summary: Press Release Notice of the Annual General Meeting to Approve the 2025 Financial Statements, Scheduled for May 22, 2026, and Changes to the Atos Board of Directors Paris, France - March 27, 2026 Notice of the Annual General Meeting on May 22, 2026 At its meeting on March 26, 2026, the board of directors decided to convene the shareholders of Atos SE to a combined annual general meeting on Friday, May 22, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. at the company’s headquarters (River Ouest – in the auditorium, 80 quai
